ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case being vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case being hospitalized */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted to the hospital */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged from the hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the patient was admitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each vaccination record
Reference to the case being vaccinated
Date when the vaccination was administered
Type of vaccine administered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca)
Unique identifier for each hospitalization record
Reference to the case being hospitalized
Date when the patient was admitted to the hospital
Date when the patient was discharged from the hospital
Name of the hospital where the patient was admitted
